name: Stable Prefix Context
description: OpenClaw context engine that only applies lossless pre-frontier injected-volatility movement when predicted prefix uplift is positive, and records prompt-cache telemetry.

telemetryPath.description: Optional JSONL output path for assemble diagnostics.

artifactPath.description: Optional directory for sidecar artifacts created by post-turn injected-context compaction.

dedupeControlMessages.description: Collapse repeated control messages before optimization.

largeBlockChars.description: Blocks at or above this size become summarize candidates when their decision engine allows it.

preFrontierInjectedWindowBlocks.description: Maximum contiguous injected-volatility blocks to move when the divergence is safely before the append boundary.

fixedPrefixKinds.description: Optional override for block kinds that should always remain in the fixed prefix.

suffixCandidateKinds.description: Optional override for block kinds that are eligible for suffix placement in offline planning.

summarizeCandidateKinds.description: Optional override for block kinds that may be summarized after send.

dropCandidateKinds.description: Optional override for block kinds that may be dropped in offline planning.

preFrontierInjectedKinds.description: Optional override for runtime-detected injected-volatility block kinds.

losslessWholeMovableKinds.description: Optional override for block kinds that can be moved whole without rewriting content.

futureOnlyKinds.description: Optional override for block kinds that are only eligible for future-turn churn reduction, not current-turn movement.

heuristicWeights.description: Optional override for heuristic scoring weights used by the core decision engine.

runtimePolicyMode.description: Runtime policy mode. The default only acts on pre-frontier injected volatility.

maintainMode.description: Post-turn maintenance mode. The default rewrites older injected context into shorter compacted forms for future-turn churn reduction.

maintainPreserveTailMessages.description: Number of newest transcript messages to leave untouched during post-turn maintenance.

maintainMinBytesSaved.description: Minimum estimated byte savings required before a transcript entry is rewritten during maintenance.

maintainMaxRewritesPerPass.description: Maximum number of transcript entries to rewrite in a single maintenance pass.

maintainRewriteKinds.description: Optional override for injected-volatility block kinds eligible for post-turn future-churn reduction.

minConfidenceToReorder.description: Legacy compatibility field retained for older configs; runtime policy no longer uses confidence-based transcript-wide reordering.

maxInternalContextChars.description: Telemetry-only hint for large internal context blocks.

maxConversationWrapperBodyChars.description: Telemetry-only hint for large conversation wrappers.
